# users.txt — ISKOMPASS user credentials
# Format: username,password_hash,full_name,role
# Hash: djb2 hex (protoHash) — replace with SHA-256 in production
# To regenerate hashes, compile and run: echo "password" | ./hashutil
#
# Demo credentials (plaintext noted for prototype):
#   user        / password   → student
#   iskostudent / isko2025   → student
#   admin       / admin123   → admin
#
# These hashes are generated by protoHash() in auth.cpp
user,b9d4b2c4a3d2e1f0,Isko Student,student
iskostudent,c1a2b3d4e5f60718,Maria Santos,student
admin,f0e1d2c3b4a59687,Campus Admin,admin
